payload.title: Machine-readable diagnostics from cargo trust build (agent loop)
payload.description: The skill's iteration loop wants structured output from the WRAPPER path, not just `trust check`. Today the shims emit human lines ([R0042] error: ...) on stderr. Add an opt-in (env var or cargo trust --message-format json) that emits the RT-70 JSON diagnostic documents during cargo trust build, so an agent can parse rule/span/fix without scraping. Reuses trust-diag's to_json; the work is plumbing it through emit_diagnostics in trust-rustc.
